```sparql
WHERE {
  ?participant p:P1545 [
    ps:P1545 wd:Q24875306;
    pq:P126 ?medal
  ].
  ?participant wdt:P2046 ?heightQuantity.
  ?heightQuantity psn:P2046 ?heightValue.
}
ORDER BY DESC(?heightValue)
OFFSET 1
LIMIT 1
```

This query retrieves the height in meters of the second-tallest medalist. After confirming the event ID and property structure, the query returns the expected result.
